subject: [PATCH 10/19] nfsd: fix version mismatch loops in nfsd_acl_init_request()

2026-06-09.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the nfsd_acl_init_request() function where the supported version range for PROG_MISMATCH is incorrectly calculated due to a version mismatch between rqstp->rq_vers and the loop variable i. The fix involves replacing rqstp->rq_vers with the loop variable i, matching the pattern used by the sibling nfsd_init_request() function. This patch addresses an issue introduced in commit e333f3bbefe3 ('nfsd: Allow containers to set supported nfs versions') and was assisted by Claude.
